text:
> 	Amulet is a C++ GUI library from CMU. It features a 
> 	prototype-instance object system, a dialog designer and widgets
> 	with a Motif, Windows 95/NT or Macintosh look.

> >Fix:
> 	
> 	Please commit.

I don't see the actual port submission here.  Is this PR missing
something or is the submitter simply confused as to how the ports
collection works?  You don't just submit a description of a desired
port in order to get it committed, you're supposed to submit the
whole port. ;-)

If that's not forthcoming then I'd like to close this PR for the
time being.

					Jordan
